notes:
Ember 1.1.0 — a big update.

• Natural voice (Gemini Live API) and free, key-less Edge neural read-aloud
• Conversational "Hey Ember": keep chatting hands-free, with the glow around Ember
• Audio-reactive glow + a redesigned floating orb
• Ember Browser: AI extension maker, load-progress + panel animations
• Norton-style Antivirus and a standalone Ad Blocker app
• Quit-proof global shortcut, adjustable mouse speed, original icon set
• Ember learns about you (smarter long-term memory)
• Lots of fixes: readable Quick-tasks menu, sticky chat auto-scroll, and more
